calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kyle Huey in propria persona.

The Court asked Mr. Huey if he is having issues establishing his marriage. Mr. Huey stated that he was married overseas, that he wants to establish his marriage here as well, and that he wants to apply for a visa to stay in Taiwan which requires a certificate of marriage from his home country. The Court noted petitioner has provided sufficient material to grant this petition. The Petition to establish fact of marriage is granted subject to written order.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: S. Le. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
